offer: For accounting firms processing 10-50 clients/month, regulatory compliance issues cause audit delays. We provide a compliance reporting tool instead of manual data collection and reporting tools.
problem: Difficulty in aggregating and formatting regulatory data for compliance reporting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on compliance tools
DM outreach to firms with demo video
Engage in community forums for accountants
try_it: Let users try data aggregation and manual adjustments on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the tool
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly progress in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
